result.stdout:
gdialog - Game Dialog Script Interpreter

Usage:
  gdialog <script.gds>          Execute a Game Dialog Script file
  gdialog --help                Show this help message
  gdialog --version             Show version information

Options:
  -h, --help                    Display this help message and exit
  -v, --version                 Display version information and exit

Examples:
  gdialog greeting.gds          Run the greeting.gds script
  gdialog demo.gds              Run the demo.gds script

For more information, visit: https://github.com/bitpatch/game-dialog-cli
